revision.text:
<includeonly>{{sidebar
| titlestyle = font-size:100%
| title = {{#ifexpr:{{replace|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|AD|}} > 10 | {{#ifexpr:{{replace|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|AD|}} > 100 |
{{#ifexist:Category:{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}
  |[[:Category:{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} by topic]]
  |{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} by topic
  }} |
{{#ifexist:Category:{{replace|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|AD|}}
  |[[:Category:{{replace|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|AD|}}|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} by topic]]
  |{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} by topic
  }} }}|
{{#ifexist:Category:{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}
  |[[:Category:{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} by topic]]
  |{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} by topic
  }}
}}
| bodyclass = hlist
| headingstyle = background-color:#f3f3f3; font-weight:normal; font-style:italic

| heading1 = Leaders
| content1 = 
{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/link|List of political entities in {{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|Political entities|List of political entities in the {{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/century|{{#invoke:string|replace|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|%s*AD%s*||plain=false}}}} century
}}{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/link|List of state leaders in {{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|State leaders|List of state leaders in the {{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/century|{{#invoke:string|replace|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|%s*AD%s*||plain=false}}}} century
}}{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/link|List of {{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/century|{{#invoke:string|replace|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|%s*AD%s*||plain=false}}|-century}} religious leaders|Religious leaders|List of religious leaders in the {{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/century|{{#invoke:string|replace|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|%s*AD%s*||plain=false}}}} century
}}
| heading2 = Categories
| content2 =  
{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/link|Category:{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} births|Births
}}{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/link|Category:{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} deaths|Deaths
}}{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/link|Category:{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} establishments|Establishments
}}{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/link|Category:{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} disestablishments|Disestablishments
}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation|content=
{{improve documentation}}
== Examples ==
{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)|500}}

{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)|AD 100}}

{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)|AD 11}}

{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)|AD 10}}

{{Uncategorized}}
}}</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{sidebar
| titlestyle = font-size:100%
| title = {{#ifexpr:{{replace|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|AD|}} > 10 | {{#ifexpr:{{replace|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|AD|}} > 100 |
{{#ifexist:Category:{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}
  |[[:Category:{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} by topic]]
  |{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} by topic
  }} |
{{#ifexist:Category:{{replace|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|AD|}}
  |[[:Category:{{replace|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|AD|}}|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} by topic]]
  |{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} by topic
  }} }}|
{{#ifexist:Category:{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}
  |[[:Category:{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} by topic]]
  |{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} by topic
  }}
}}
| bodyclass = hlist
| headingstyle = background-color:#f3f3f3; font-weight:normal; font-style:italic

| heading1 = Leaders
| content1 = 
{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/link|List of political entities in {{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|Political entities|List of political entities in the {{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/century|{{#invoke:string|replace|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|%s*AD%s*||plain=false}}}} century
}}{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/link|List of state leaders in {{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|State leaders|List of state leaders in the {{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/century|{{#invoke:string|replace|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|%s*AD%s*||plain=false}}}} century
}}{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/link|List of {{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/century|{{#invoke:string|replace|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|%s*AD%s*||plain=false}}|-century}} religious leaders|Religious leaders|List of religious leaders in the {{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/century|{{#invoke:string|replace|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|%s*AD%s*||plain=false}}}} century
}}
| heading2 = Categories
| content2 =  
{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/link|Category:{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} births|Births
}}{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/link|Category:{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} deaths|Deaths
}}{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/link|Category:{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} establishments|Establishments
}}{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/link|Category:{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} disestablishments|Disestablishments
}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation|content=
{{improve documentation}}
== Examples ==
{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)|500}}

{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)|AD 100}}

{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)|AD 11}}

{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)|AD 10}}

{{Uncategorized}}
}}</noinclude>

}}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{sidebar
| titlestyle = font-size:100%
| title = {{#ifexpr:{{replace|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|AD|}} > 10 | {{#ifexpr:{{replace|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|AD|}} > 100 |

  |[[:Category:1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} by topic]]
  |{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} by topic
  }} |

  |[[:Category:replace|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|AD|}}|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} by topic]]
  |{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} by topic
  }} }}|

  |[[:Category:1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} by topic]]
  |{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} by topic
  }}
}}
| bodyclass = hlist
| headingstyle = background-color:#f3f3f3; font-weight:normal; font-style:italic

| heading1 = Leaders
| content1 =

}}

}}{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/link|Category:1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} deaths|Deaths
}}{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/link|Category:1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} establishments|Establishments

}}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{sidebar
| titlestyle = font-size:100%
| title = {{#ifexpr:{{replace|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|AD|}} > 10 | {{#ifexpr:{{replace|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|AD|}} > 100 |
{{#ifexist:Category:1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}
  |[[:Category:1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} by topic]]
  |{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} by topic
  }} |
{{#ifexist:Category:replace|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|AD|}}
  |[[:Category:replace|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|AD|}}|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} by topic]]
  |{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} by topic
  }} }}|
{{#ifexist:Category:1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}
  |[[:Category:1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} by topic]]
  |{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} by topic
  }}
}}
| bodyclass = hlist
| headingstyle = background-color:#f3f3f3; font-weight:normal; font-style:italic

| heading1 = Leaders
| content1 = 
{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/link|List of political entities in {{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|Political entities|List of political entities in the {{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/century|{{#invoke:string|replace|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|%s*AD%s*||plain=false}}}} century
}}{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/link|List of state leaders in {{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|State leaders|List of state leaders in the {{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/century|{{#invoke:string|replace|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|%s*AD%s*||plain=false}}}} century
}}{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/link|List of {{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/century|{{#invoke:string|replace|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|%s*AD%s*||plain=false}}|-century}} religious leaders|Religious leaders|List of religious leaders in the {{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/century|{{#invoke:string|replace|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|%s*AD%s*||plain=false}}}} century
}}
| heading2 = Categories
| content2 =  
{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/link|Category:1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} births|Births
}}{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/link|Category:1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} deaths|Deaths
}}{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/link|Category:1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} establishments|Establishments
}}{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/link|Category:1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} disestablishments|Disestablishments
}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation|content=
{{improve documentation}}
== Examples ==
{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)|500}}

{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)|AD 100}}

{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)|AD 11}}

{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)|AD 10}}

{{Uncategorized}}
}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{sidebar
| titlestyle = font-size:100%
| title = {{#ifexpr:{{replace|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|AD|}} > 10 | {{#ifexpr:{{replace|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|AD|}} > 100 |
{{#ifexist:Category:1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}
  |[[:Category:1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} by topic]]
  |{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} by topic
  }} |
{{#ifexist:Category:replace|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|AD|}}
  |[[:Category:replace|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|AD|}}|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} by topic]]
  |{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} by topic
  }} }}|
{{#ifexist:Category:1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}
  |[[:Category:1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} by topic]]
  |{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} by topic
  }}
}}
| bodyclass = hlist
| headingstyle = background-color:#f3f3f3; font-weight:normal; font-style:italic

| heading1 = Leaders
| content1 = 
{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/link|List of political entities in {{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|Political entities|List of political entities in the {{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/century|{{#invoke:string|replace|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|%s*AD%s*||plain=false}}}} century
}}{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/link|List of state leaders in {{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|State leaders|List of state leaders in the {{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/century|{{#invoke:string|replace|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|%s*AD%s*||plain=false}}}} century
}}{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/link|List of {{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/century|{{#invoke:string|replace|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|%s*AD%s*||plain=false}}|-century}} religious leaders|Religious leaders|List of religious leaders in the {{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/century|{{#invoke:string|replace|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|%s*AD%s*||plain=false}}}} century
}}
| heading2 = Categories
| content2 =  
{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/link|Category:1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} births|Births
}}{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/link|Category:1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} deaths|Deaths
}}{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/link|Category:1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} establishments|Establishments
}}{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/link|Category:1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} disestablishments|Disestablishments
}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation|content=
{{improve documentation}}
== Examples ==
{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)|500}}

{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)|AD 100}}

{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)|AD 11}}

{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)|AD 10}}

{{Uncategorized}}
}}</noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23513454770|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{sidebar
| titlestyle = font-size:100%
| title = {{#ifexpr:{{replace|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|AD|}} > 10 | {{#ifexpr:{{replace|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|AD|}} > 100 |
{{#ifexist:Category:1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}
  |[[:Category:1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} by topic]]
  |{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} by topic
  }} |
{{#ifexist:Category:replace|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|AD|}}
  |[[:Category:replace|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|AD|}}|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} by topic]]
  |{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} by topic
  }} }}|
{{#ifexist:Category:1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}
  |[[:Category:1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} by topic]]
  |{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} by topic
  }}
}}
| bodyclass = hlist
| headingstyle = background-color:#f3f3f3; font-weight:normal; font-style:italic

| heading1 = Leaders
| content1 = 
{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/link|List of political entities in {{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|Political entities|List of political entities in the {{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/century|{{#invoke:string|replace|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|%s*AD%s*||plain=false}}}} century
}}{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/link|List of state leaders in {{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|State leaders|List of state leaders in the {{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/century|{{#invoke:string|replace|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|%s*AD%s*||plain=false}}}} century
}}{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/link|List of {{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/century|{{#invoke:string|replace|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|%s*AD%s*||plain=false}}|-century}} religious leaders|Religious leaders|List of religious leaders in the {{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/century|{{#invoke:string|replace|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|%s*AD%s*||plain=false}}}} century
}}
| heading2 = Categories
| content2 =  
{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/link|Category:1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} births|Births
}}{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/link|Category:1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} deaths|Deaths
}}{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/link|Category:1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} establishments|Establishments
}}{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/link|Category:1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} disestablishments|Disestablishments
}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation|content=
{{improve documentation}}
== Examples ==
{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)|500}}

{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)|AD 100}}

{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)|AD 11}}

{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)|AD 10}}

{{Uncategorized}}
}}</noinclude>
<noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{sidebar
| titlestyle = font-size:100%
| title = {{#ifexpr:{{replace|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|AD|}} > 10 | {{#ifexpr:{{replace|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|AD|}} > 100 |
{{#ifexist:Category:1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}
  |[[:Category:1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} by topic]]
  |{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} by topic
  }} |
{{#ifexist:Category:replace|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|AD|}}
  |[[:Category:replace|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|AD|}}|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} by topic]]
  |{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} by topic
  }} }}|
{{#ifexist:Category:1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}
  |[[:Category:1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} by topic]]
  |{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} by topic
  }}
}}
| bodyclass = hlist
| headingstyle = background-color:#f3f3f3; font-weight:normal; font-style:italic

| heading1 = Leaders
| content1 = 
{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/link|List of political entities in {{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|Political entities|List of political entities in the {{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/century|{{#invoke:string|replace|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|%s*AD%s*||plain=false}}}} century
}}{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/link|List of state leaders in {{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|State leaders|List of state leaders in the {{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/century|{{#invoke:string|replace|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|%s*AD%s*||plain=false}}}} century
}}{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/link|List of {{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/century|{{#invoke:string|replace|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|%s*AD%s*||plain=false}}|-century}} religious leaders|Religious leaders|List of religious leaders in the {{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/century|{{#invoke:string|replace|{{{1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}|%s*AD%s*||plain=false}}}} century
}}
| heading2 = Categories
| content2 =  
{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/link|Category:1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} births|Births
}}{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/link|Category:1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} deaths|Deaths
}}{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/link|Category:1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} establishments|Establishments
}}{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/link|Category:1|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}} disestablishments|Disestablishments
}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation|content=
{{improve documentation}}
== Examples ==
{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)|500}}

{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)|AD 100}}

{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)|AD 11}}

{{M1YearInTopic (no calendar)|AD 10}}

{{Uncategorized}}
}}
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
